title: runlabel should sub podman for docker|/usr/bin/docker
body:
Many RH images use a fully-qualified path to docker in their RUN
labels.  While initially we wanted an exact match for substituting
commands, docker is a good exception.

Bug #1623282

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body: @rhatdan I want you to LGTM this before it is merged.

LGTM, but the problematic F28 cloud test is being problematic again.
I think F28 cloud is busted everywhere - the image, maybe?
My trust in our CI is pretty much evaporated. Merging manually.
